Uses of Interface
microui.event.Listener

Packages that use Listener
Package
Description
microui.component
 
microui.core
 
microui.core.base
 
microui.core.controller
 
microui.event
 
microui.util
 

  • Uses of Listener in microui.component

    Methods in microui.component with parameters of type Listener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.add(String title, Listener onClickListener)
    Adds a plain item with a click listener to the menu.
    MenuButton
    MenuButton.add(String title, processing.core.PImage icon, Listener onClickListener)
    Adds a plain item with an icon and click listener to the menu.
    LabeledCheckBox
    LabeledCheckBox.onStateChangedListener(Listener listener)
    Sets a listener to be called when the checkbox state changes.
    TextField
    TextField.setOnEnterPressedListener(Listener onEnterPressedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the Enter key is pressed.
    TextField
    TextField.setOnFocusChangedListener(Listener onFocusChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the text field's focus changes.
    final void
    CheckBox.setOnStateChangedListener(Listener onStateChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the checkbox's state changes.
    void
    TextArea.setOnStyleChangedListener(Listener onStyleChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the text style changes.
    void
    TextArea.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the text content changes.
    TextField
    TextField.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the text content changes.

  • Uses of Listener in microui.core

    Methods in microui.core that return Listener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final Listener
    LinearRangeControl.getOnChangeValueListener()
    Gets the listener called when the value changes.
    final Listener
    LinearRangeControl.getOnEndChangeValueListener()
    Gets the listener called when a value change ends.
    final Listener
    LinearRangeControl.getOnStartChangeValueListener()
    Gets the listener called when a value change starts.
    Methods in microui.core with parameters of type Listener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final void
    LinearRangeControl.setOnChangeValueListener(Listener onChangeValueListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when the value changes.
    final void
    LinearRangeControl.setOnEndChangeValueListener(Listener onEndChangeValueListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when a value change ends.
    void
    TextEditorModel.setOnSelectingListener(Listener listener)
    Sets a listener to be notified when selection changes.
    final void
    LinearRangeControl.setOnStartChangeValueListener(Listener onStartChangeValueListener)
    Sets the listener to be called when a value change starts.
    void
    TextEditorModel.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets a listener to be notified when the text content changes.

  • Uses of Listener in microui.core.base

    Methods in microui.core.base with parameters of type Listener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final Component
    Component.onClick(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for click events (press + release combination).
    final Component
    Component.onDoubleClick(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for double-click events (two rapid clicks).
    final Component
    Component.onDragEnd(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for drag end events (end of drag operation).
    final Component
    Component.onDragging(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for dragging events (continuous during drag).
    final Component
    Component.onDragStart(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for drag start events (beginning of drag operation).
    final Component
    Component.onEnter(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for mouse enter events (mouse enters component bounds).
    final Component
    Component.onEnterLong(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for long enter events (extended hover).
    final Component
    Component.onHover(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for hover events (mouse over component).
    final Component
    Component.onLeave(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for mouse leave events (mouse leaves component bounds).
    final Component
    Component.onLeaveLong(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for long leave events (mouse leaves after long hover).
    final Component
    Component.onLongPress(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for long press events (extended mouse button hold).
    final Component
    Component.onPress(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for press events (mouse button down over component).
    final Component
    Component.onPressed(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for pressed state events (continuous while pressed).
    final Component
    Component.onRelease(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for release events (mouse button up after press).
    final Component
    Component.onReleased(Listener listener)
    Registers a listener for released state events (continuous while released).

  • Uses of Listener in microui.core.controller

    Methods in microui.core.controller with parameters of type Listener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    FullSingleLineTextController.setOnAfterCharInsertListener(Listener onAfterCharInsertListener)
    Sets the listener for after-character-insert events.
    void
    SingleLineTextController.setOnAfterCharInsertListener(Listener onAfterCharInsertListener)
    Sets the listener for after-character-insert events.
    void
    FullSingleLineTextController.setOnAfterStringInsertListener(Listener onAfterStringInsertListener)
    Sets the listener for after-string-insert events.
    void
    SingleLineTextController.setOnAfterStringInsertListener(Listener onAfterStringInsertListener)
    Sets the listener for after-string-insert events.
    final void
    FullSingleLineTextController.setOnHistoryChangedListener(Listener onHistoryChangedListener)
    Sets the listener for history-changed events (undo/redo operations).
    void
    FullSingleLineTextController.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets the listener for text-changed events.
    void
    MultiLineTextController.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets the listener for text change events.
    void
    SingleLineTextController.setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
    Sets the listener for text-changed events.

  • Uses of Listener in microui.event

    Methods in microui.event with parameters of type Listener
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    InteractionHandler.addListener(EventType eventType, Listener listener)
    Adds a listener for a specific event type.
    void
    InteractionHandler.removeListener(EventType eventType, Listener listener)
    Removes a listener for a specific event type.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BoundedValue
    BoundedValue.setOnChangeValueListener(Listener onChangeValueListener)
    Sets the listener to be notified when the value changes.
